Uses of Interface
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.context.McpSyncRequestContext

Packages that use McpSyncRequestContext
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.context
Request context types, specifications (logging, progress, sampling, elicitation), and default implementations for MCP request handling.
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.tool
Method callbacks and utilities for MCP tool invocation (call_tool).
